sections.paragraph:
verb לחבול

to injure, damage, harm; seize, pledge

verb להיחבל

be injured, wounded, harmed

verb לחבל

to sabotage, damage; plot, devise; conceive

verb חובל (>>חֻבַּל)

be sabotaged, damaged; injured; conceived

verb לחבל (>>חיבל)

to sabotage, damage; plot, devise; conceive

masculine noun

rope, cord, line, tether, hawser, tie, twist; district

interjection

it is a pity , what a pity , alas
